overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a morning walk through downtown Los Santos. The camera moves along city sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection, and passes the historic City Hall building with its distinctive tower, encountering pedestrians and moderate vehicle traffic in a sunny urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with commercial vehicle parking

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a parked delivery truck

entered.detail: large white box truck with green and red pharmacy branding parked at the curb
low stone block wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
tall art deco civic building with vertical lines and a distinctive tower
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunny urban sidewalk next to a parked pharmacy truck. The camera moves forward past the vehicle, with a stone wall on the right and the impressive City Hall tower visible ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with civic buildings

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street while vehicles pass through the intersection
turning right to face the City Hall building while continuing to walk along the plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning to walk along the City Hall plaza, observing the traffic

notable_agents.action: green garbage truck driving along the street in front of the City Hall
person in dark clothing crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall cylindrical glass office building reflecting the sunlight
large green sanitation truck moving along the road
traffic signal poles at the intersection showing red lights

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide intersection, passing through the crosswalk as cars and a garbage truck move through. After crossing, it turns to reveal the full facade of the City Hall building with modern skyscrapers visible in the background, transitioning from the narrow sidewalk to the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: civic building plaza with pedestrian walkway and vendor

events.description: passing a colorful food cart with a red, yellow, and green umbrella on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the City Hall sidewalk approaching the main entrance stairs, passing under tree shade

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing beside a red cart with a colorful rasta-style umbrella

entered.detail: red food vending cart with a large colorful umbrella providing shade
wide stone staircase leading up to the arched entrance of the City Hall
mature trees providing shade over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the shaded plaza in front of the City Hall, the camera passes a food vendor with a colorful umbrella and approaches the grand stone staircase entrance. The building's art deco details and arched doorways become more prominent as the camera moves closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to street intersection with mountain views

events.description: passing the City Hall entrance stairs and continuing along the sidewalk
approaching a crosswalk with pedestrians crossing the upcoming intersection

agents.ego_description: continuing past the City Hall entrance toward the next intersection with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: group of people crossing the intersection ahead

entered.detail: black metal park bench on the sidewalk near the building
hazy mountains visible in the background beyond the city streets

segments.scene_description: Moving past the City Hall entrance, the camera continues along the sidewalk where the building now appears on the right. The scene opens up to reveal distant mountains and an upcoming intersection with pedestrians crossing, transitioning from the civic plaza back to a standard city street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow urban sidewalk through a grand civic plaza and back into the open city street. It begins by moving past a parked pharmacy truck and a stone wall, with the distant City Hall tower framing the path ahead. As the camera crosses a wide intersection filled with cars and a garbage truck, the view expands from the confined sidewalk to reveal the full facade of City Hall set against a backdrop of modern skyscrapers. The scene then shifts into the shaded plaza, passing a colorful food vendor umbrella before approaching the art deco details and arched doorways of the grand stone staircase. Finally, the camera moves past the entrance and continues along the sidewalk, where the building recedes to the right to reveal distant mountains and a bustling intersection with crossing pedestrians.
